title: Key Contributions of Peter Norvig in AI
description: A timeline highlighting major milestones and publications in Peter Norvig's career that have significantly influenced the field of Artificial Intelligence.
elements: Co-author of 'Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach' (1995, 2002, 2010, 2020)
Director of Search Quality at Google (2002-2005)
Co-creator of the first web-based Massive Open Online Course (MOOC) on AI (2011)
relationships: Chronological progression of career roles and influential works
